# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Datacenter Self-Hosted Build & Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: Shell commands to build (runs on self-hosted runner)
        required: true
        default: ./scripts/build.sh
      deploy_script:
        description: Shell commands to deploy (runs on self-hosted runner)
        required: true
        default: ./scripts/deploy.sh
      working_directory:
        description: Working directory for commands (relative to repo root)
        required: false
        default: .
      shell:
        description: Shell to use (bash, pwsh, sh)
        required: false
        default: bash
      runner_labels:
        description: JSON array of runner labels (must include self-hosted). Example: ["self-hosted","datacenter","linux"]
        required: false
        default: '["self-hosted","datacenter"]'
      environment:
        description: GitHub environment name (optional)
        required: false
        default: ""
      ref:
        description: Git ref to checkout (optional). Defaults to the ref that triggered the workflow.
        required: false
        default: ""

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: datacenter-${{ github.repository }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    name: Build and Deploy (Self-hosted)
    runs-on: ${{ fromJson(inputs.runner_labels) }}
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment != '' && inputs.environment || null }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ inputs.ref != '' && inputs.ref || github.ref }}
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Validate required inputs
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          test -n "${{ inputs.build_script }}"
          test -n "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"

      - name: Build (developer-provided)
        run: ${{ inputs.build_script }}

      - name: Deploy (developer-provided)
        run: ${{ inputs.deploy_script }}
